source.title: Anxiety Cells in a Hippocampal-Hypothalamic Circuit

confidence_rationale: Identifies a dedicated cell population in vCA1 that is activated by anxiogenic environments and required for avoidance behaviour, with a specific projection-target identity (LHA, not BA). This is anxiety/sustained-threat as a distinct affect channel — but in vCA1 these cells are 'modulated firing' to anxiogenic state rather than place-field remapping.
failure_signatures: Anxiety is encoded in ventral CA1 by dedicated cells projecting to LHA, not by remapping of dorsal place cells.

If REE assumed all hippocampal-map affect channels share the same architectural mechanism (remapping in dorsal CA1), this falsifies that uniformity: anxiety operates through projection-target-defined modulated firing in ventral CA1.

mapping.source_claim_statement: Ventral CA1 contains 'anxiety cells' activated by anxiogenic environments and required for avoidance; they are enriched in the vCA1 population projecting to the lateral hypothalamic area, not the basal amygdala. The same vCA1-LHA pathway is causally required for innate anxiety behaviour.
mapping.ree_translation: Anxiety/sustained threat is a distinct affect stream from acute fear (Moita/Wang) and from reward (Gauthier/Tank), with its own anatomical substrate: ventral CA1 cells defined by their LHA projection. Architecturally, this means the SD-011 generalization needs to allow channel-specific cells to differ in their *projection target* and *subregion* (dorsal vs ventral), not just their identity.
mapping.mapping_caveat: These cells show modulated firing in anxiogenic environments rather than the canonical place-field remapping seen in dorsal CA1. So whether 'anxiety' qualifies as map-remapping or map-modulation depends on which criterion you adopt. Dorsal place cells in the same paradigm do not show the same anxiety encoding.
mapping.source_context: Mice, ventral and dorsal CA1, freely-moving Ca2+ imaging, optogenetic activation/inhibition, anxiogenic environments (elevated plus maze, open field).

confidence_components.notes: Neuron paper, Hen/Kheirbek labs, large authorship team, optogenetic causal manipulation. Mapping fidelity moderated by the modulated-firing-vs-remapping distinction: anxiety qualifies as a privileged channel by the dedicated-population criterion but not by the place-field-reorganization criterion.
